title: California Driver's License Renewal
description: Renew an individual's California driver's license through the California Department of Motor Vehicles. This document describes the renewal-method branch (online, by mail, or in person), the conditions that force an in-person renewal, and the licence-holder inputs. It pairs with the published us/ca/dmv/vehicle-registration-renewal to show one authority with multiple processes. It does not submit the renewal; the live dmv.ca.gov source is always authoritative (see verification).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the official CA DMV 'Renew your driver's license' page. The renewal-method branch (online within 90 days before / 12 months after expiration; by mail; in person) and the in-person triggers (REAL ID upgrade, address/personal-description change, certain ages, vision or medical changes) were confirmed against the source; individual input fields reflect the renewal flow but are not yet independently re-verified item-by-item. Conditional requiredness (in-person triggers) cannot be expressed in the v0.1 linear flow and is recorded in field descriptions; see GSP-0004. Fees are intentionally not encoded. Status remains 'draft'. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: driverLicenseNumber
fields.label: California driver's license number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. A California DL number is one letter followed by 7 digits, e.g. D1234567.
fields.sourceRef: Renewal notice / license card — DL number

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Your name as it appears on the current licence.

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: First name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: middleName
fields.label: Middle name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Full date, YYYY-MM-DD. Drivers turning a qualifying age (generally 70 and older) may be required to complete part of the renewal in person; the live source states the current age rules.

fields.name: last4SSN
fields.label: Last four digits of your Social Security number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Used by DMV to verify identity for an online or mail renewal.

fields.name: licenseExpirationDate
fields.label: Current licence expiration date
fields.description: Full date, YYYY-MM-DD. Online renewal is available from 90 days before to 12 months after this date; outside that window a different path applies. This timing rule is recorded here but cannot be enforced as a v0.1 constraint.
fields.sourceRef: Renew DL — eligibility window (90 days before / 12 months after expiration)

fields.name: renewalMethod
fields.label: How do you want to renew?
fields.description: online = renew on the DMV website (eligible only if no address change, no REAL ID upgrade, and within the timing window); by_mail = renew using the mailed renewal notice when eligible; in_person = renew at a DMV field office (required for the triggers below).
fields.sourceRef: Renew DL — online, by mail, or in person

fields.name: upgradingToRealId
fields.label: Are you upgrading to a REAL ID at this renewal?
fields.description: A first-time REAL ID requires an in-person visit with original identity, Social Security, and residency documents. If true, renewalMethod must be in_person.
fields.sourceRef: Renew DL — REAL ID upgrade requires in person

fields.name: addressOrNameChange
fields.label: Has your address or personal description changed since your last licence?
fields.description: A change of address or personal description generally cannot be completed in the basic online renewal and may require a different DMV transaction or an in-person visit. If true, check the live source for the correct path.
fields.sourceRef: Renew DL — changes requiring a different path

fields.name: visionOrMedicalChange
fields.label: Have you had a vision change (e.g. recent eye surgery) or a new medical condition affecting driving?
fields.description: Recent vision surgery (such as LASIK) or a new disability/medical condition affecting safe driving generally requires an in-person renewal with a vision exam. If true, renewalMethod must be in_person.
fields.sourceRef: Renew DL — conditions requiring in-person renewal (vision/medical)

fields.name: residenceAddressLine1
fields.label: Residence address — street address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Your California residence address.

fields.name: residenceAddressLine2
fields.label: Residence address — apartment, suite, or unit (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: residenceAddressCity
fields.label: Residence address — city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: residenceAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Residence address — ZIP code
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. 5-digit or ZIP+4 format, e.g. 90210 or 90210-1234. The state is California (US-CA).

fields.name: mailingAddressDiffers
fields.label: Is your mailing address different from your residence address?
fields.description: If true, provide a separate mailing address on the live source where the new licence should be sent.
